---
package: "openpipeline"
version: "v4.2.0"
title: "pca"
namespace: "Dimred"
description: "Computes PCA coordinates, loadings and variance decomposition"
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline v4.2.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `pca`  
Namespace: `dimred`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline/tree/v4.2.0/src/dimred/pca)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/dimred/pca)

:::



## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/dimred/pca/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/dimred/pca).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/dimred/pca/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).

## Argument groups

### Arguments

|Name                   |Description                                                                                                    |Attributes                  |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--output_compression` |Compression format to use for the output AnnData and/or Mudata H5 files. By default no compression is applied. |`string`, example: `"gzip"` |


### inputs

|Name          |Description                                                                           |Attributes                                |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input`     |Input h5mu file                                                                       |`file`, required, example: `"input.h5mu"` |
|`--modality`  |Which modality from the input MuData file to process.                                 |`string`, default: `"rna"`                |
|`--layer`     |Use specified layer for expression values instead of the .X object from the modality. |`string`                                  |
|`--var_input` |Column name in .var matrix that will be used to select which genes to run the PCA on. |`string`, example: `"filter_with_hvg"`    |


### Options

|Name               |Description                                                                                                                                                                 |Attributes               |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--num_components` |Number of principal components to compute. Defaults to 50, or 1 - minimum dimension size of selected representation.                                                        |`integer`, example: `25` |
|`--chunked`        |If True, perform an incremental PCA on segments of a predefined size. Setting this flag automatically implies zero centering. Must be specified together with --chunk_size. |`boolean_true`           |
|`--chunk_size`     |Number of observations to include in each chunk. Required if chunked=True was passed.                                                                                       |`integer`                |
|`--seed`           |Used to set the initial states for the optimization.                                                                                                                        |`integer`                |


### Outputs

|Name            |Description                                                 |Attributes                                 |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--output`      |Output h5mu file.                                           |`file`, required, example: `"output.h5mu"` |
|`--obsm_output` |In which .obsm slot to store the resulting embedding.       |`string`, default: `"X_pca"`               |
|`--varm_output` |In which .varm slot to store the resulting loadings matrix. |`string`, default: `"pca_loadings"`        |
|`--uns_output`  |In which .uns slot to store the resulting variance objects. |`string`, default: `"pca_variance"`        |
|`--overwrite`   |Allow overwriting .obsm, .varm and .uns slots.              |`boolean_true`                             |

## Authors


  * Dries De Maeyer [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/ddemaeyer) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dries-de-maeyer-b46a814) (maintainer)
